name: Dialpad
description: Sync Dialpad call logs and contacts into the Shielva knowledge base via the Dialpad REST API v2.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.help: From the Dialpad Developer Portal → Your App → OAuth Credentials → Client ID

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.help: From the Dialpad Developer Portal → Your App → OAuth Credentials → Client Secret

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: Optional. The OAuth redirect URI registered in your Dialpad App. Leave blank to use the default.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate client_id and client_secret. If an access_token is configured, probe GET /api/v2/users/me.

methods.name: Authorize
methods.description: Return the Dialpad OAuth2 authorization URL for the consent screen.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /api/v2/users/me and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE. Updates the circuit breaker.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Dialpad call logs and contacts into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Call Logs
methods.description: Cursor-paginated list of call logs. Optionally filtered by started_after timestamp.
